evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: huolehdit datan laadusta, tietoturvasta ja sääntelyn vaatimustenmukaisuudesta
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Responsibilities emphasise data quality, data security, and regulatory compliance ("sääntelyn vaatimustenmukaisuudesta") with no speed/velocity language present.
evidence.domain_risk: huolehdit datan laadusta, tietoturvasta ja sääntelyn vaatimustenmukaisuudesta
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The JD explicitly names regulatory compliance ("sääntelyn vaatimustenmukaisuudesta") and data security as owned responsibilities for a critical national infrastructure operator, meeting the high domain-risk bar.
evidence.data_team_maturity: kehität toimintamalleja yhteistyössä data- ja analytiikkakumppaneiden kanssa
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named platform (Snowflake), an existing Data Vault architecture, and established modelling/reporting principles across multiple business functions point to an established, specialised data function at scale.
evidence.jd_authorship: Työhösi kuuluu analytiikkadatan looginen ja fyysinen mallintaminen, Snowflake-pohjaisen analytiikka-alustan datarakenteiden kehittäminen sekä raportointi- ja analytiikkaratkaisujen toteuttaminen liiketoiminnan tarpeisiin
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise technical specificity — logical/physical data modelling, Snowflake platform, Data Vault architecture, Power BI — reads like it was written by someone who does this job.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: tuottamalla yhteismitallista, luotettavaa ja liiketoimintalähtöistä tietoa ja mittareita Finavian eri toimintoihin
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves the analytics/data platform itself and produces standardised metrics for many internal functions rather than one named commercial, product, or finance audience, closest to internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role both defines shared modelling/reporting principles (strategic) and translates business requirements into solutions and participates in projects (execution), combining both patterns.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or AI-consuming infrastructure appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality is mentioned only generically ("datan laadusta") without a testing framework, contract, or specific ownership verb tied to testing practice.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: huolehdit datan laadusta, tietoturvasta ja sääntelyn vaatimustenmukaisuudesta
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Regulatory compliance and data security appear early in the responsibilities section as a named accountability, matching high loss-aversion framing driven by regulatory exposure.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role develops shared modelling principles (new standards) while working within an existing Snowflake/Data Vault platform (fix/scale), a mix of both.
evidence.language_gate: suomen ja englannin kielen suullista ja kirjallista taitoa
evidence.work_arrangement: Työskentelemme joustavasti lähityössä ainakin puolet työajasta
evidence.loss_aversion: huolehdit datan laadusta, tietoturvasta ja sääntelyn vaatimustenmukaisuudesta — reflects regulatory compliance and data security risk exposure at a critical airport infrastructure operator, not just pipeline reliability.
